nodes.title: Set Current Location
nodes.description: Given a WorldMapManager with locations loaded, when SetCurrentLocation(loc) is called, then CurrentLocation is updated and OnLocationChanged event fires with the new location.

nodes.title: Get Next Locations
nodes.description: Given a current location with NextLocationIds ['b', 'c'], when GetNextLocations() is called, then it returns the LocationNode objects for 'b' and 'c' from the index.

nodes.title: Transition To Location
nodes.description: Given a target LocationNode, when TransitionTo() is called, then story beats are triggered, dialogue choices are presented if configured, and encounter starts if the location has an EncounterConfig.

nodes.title: Location Story Beats
nodes.description: Given a LocationNode with configured StoryBeats, when TransitionTo is called, then NarrativeManager.PlayStoryBeats is called with the location's beats before combat starts.

nodes.title: Location Dialogue Choices
nodes.description: Given a LocationNode with a DialogueChoiceBeat, when TransitionTo is called, then NarrativeManager presents choices. Correct choice triggers next location; wrong choice may trigger sin miniboss encounter.

nodes.title: Encounter Config Spawn
nodes.description: Given an EncounterConfig ScriptableObject, when combat starts from that config, then enemy characters and boss are spawned as configured, and hazard configs are passed to CombatHazardManager.

nodes.title: Rebuild Location Index
nodes.description: Given AllLocations list on WorldMapManager, when RebuildLocationIndex() is called, then a dictionary mapping LocationId to LocationNode is built for O(1) lookups via GetLocation(id).

nodes.title: Scene Transition
nodes.description: Given a SceneTransition component with a target location, when its button is clicked, then WorldMapManager.TransitionTo() is called with the configured LocationNode.
